channel.title: News on Amin Karbasi
channel.description: Recent content in News on Amin Karbasi

item.title: Mehraveh Salehi Graduated!
item.description: Mehraveh Salehi Graduated with her PhD thesis entitled “Individualized and Task-Specific Human Brain Mapping”.

item.title: NSF CAREER Award 2019
item.description: Amin Karbasi won NSF CAREER Award 2019!

item.title: Amazon Research Award
item.description: Amin Karbasi won NSF Amazon Research Award!

item.title: Understanding Ourselves Through Neuroimaging and Algorithms
item.description: Understanding Ourselves Through Neuroimaging and Algorithms: link

item.title: ONR Young Investigator Award 2019
item.description: Amin Karbasi won ONR Young Investigator Award 2019!

item.title: CVPR 2018 Tutorial on Big Data Summarization
item.description: CVPR 2018 tutorial on Big Data Summarization: Algorithms and Applications.

item.title: 5 Papers in ICML 2018
item.description: 5 papers accepted to International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2018.

item.title: Google PhD felloswhip
item.description: Lin Chen received 2018 Google PhD felloswhip. Congrats Lin.

item.title: AFOSR Young Investigator Research Award 2018
item.description: Amin Karbasi won AFOSR Young Investigator Research Award 2018!

item.title: ONR Young Investigator Award 2019
item.description: We are organizing a workshop at NIPS 2017 on Discrete Structures in Machine Learning.

item.title: MICCAI Young Scientist Award
item.description: MICCAI Young Scientist Award for ”A Submodular Approach to Create Individualized Parcellations of Human Brain”

item.title: 4 papers in AISTATS 2018
item.description: 4 papers accepted to International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS), 2018

item.title: Facebook-Main Award for Mehraveh Salehi
item.description: Facebook-Main Award for Mehraveh Salehi. Congratulations Mehraveh!

item.title: ONR Young Investigator Award 2019
item.description: ISIT 2018 Tutorial on Submodularity in Information and Data Science.
